name: Onions Stuffed with Garlic and Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 whole head fresh garlic, peeled and chopped
1 can (8 oz.) water chestnuts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the unskinned onions in boiling water for about 5 minutes. Remove and cool.
2. Cut off tops, peel, and scoop out the insides. Chop the insides of onions. Set aside.
3. In a frying pan, cook bacon until crisp. Drain off fat.
4. Add butter and saute the bacon bits, chopped onion, and chopped cloves of garlic until just lightly brown.
5. Add water chestnuts and bread crumbs. Continue to brown for another 3 minutes.
6. Add salt and pepper. Fill each onion with the mixture.
7. Place in a casserole. Pour apple cider over and bake at 375 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes.
